---

## 1. Role Justification

The Senior Backend Engineer is responsible for backend abstraction layer design, PlayFab integration, anti-cheat systems, and server-side validation. This is a P0 hire required for Stage 5 (Full Production). The role sits under Dmitri Volkov's direction and owns the entire server-side architecture for the game, including economy services, player data persistence, real-time multiplayer coordination, and server-authoritative game logic validation.

This hire is critical because server-side architecture decisions directly impact game integrity — particularly anti-cheat measures and economy balance. A senior engineer with PlayFab experience ensures we leverage the platform's full capabilities while maintaining clean abstraction layers between backend services and gameplay code.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 3 (Backend Architecture), 5 (Backend Implementation), 7 (Anti-Cheat & Server Validation), 10 (Backend Operations Monitoring)

---

---

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 5+ years backend engineering for games or cloud services
- Backend abstraction layer design (IAuthService, IDataService, IEconomyService patterns)
- PlayFab platform experience (Cloud Script, Azure Functions, Cosmos DB, Event Grid)
- Anti-cheat framework design and server-authoritative validation
- Microservices architecture with demonstrated latency optimization
- Experience mentoring mid-level backend engineers

---

## 4. Nice-to-Have Qualifications

- Experience with PlayFab economy service at 50M+ daily transaction scale
- Published technical writing on game backend architecture
- Machine learning-based cheat detection experience
- Multi-region deployment experience
